data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the delivery confirmation requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the delivery confirmation process, including the digital signature capture and photo documentation. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of these features or any relevant API endpoints. The linked use case outlines the requirement, but without specific API reads or persisted state checks demonstrating that this functionality is operational, the requirement remains unverified.
gaps: No evidence of mobile signature capture functionality or API endpoints to validate this feature.
No evidence of photo documentation linked to the signature capture.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for delivery confirmation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the delivery confirmation requirement.
